urarī—√kṛ to make wide, extend;
to admit, allow, assent, adopt,  Sāh.  Comm. on  ChUp. ;
to adopt, assume,  Śiś. x, 14 ;
to accept, receive,  Daś. ;
to promise, agree,  Naiṣ.
